[2026-01-05T20:13:15+08:00] dapo-from-justrl-20260105201233-58296694-81fc6-cfcd2 >> {"@caller":"gitlab.basemind.com/basemind/brainpp/projects/kubebrain/pkg/workspace/worker/shim/runner.(*ShimOptions).Run","@file":"projects/kubebrain/pkg/workspace/worker/shim/runner/server.go:133","@level":"warning","@msg":"Command exited abnormally","@timestamp":"2026-01-05T12:13:15.618Z","error":"exit status 1"} [2026-01-05T20:13:15+08:00] dapo-from-justrl-20260105201233-58296694-81fc6-cfcd2 >> {"@caller":"gitlab.basemind.com/basemind/brainpp/projects/kubebrain/pkg/workspace/worker/init.(*Server).wait","@file":"projects/kubebrain/pkg/workspace/worker/init/server.go:126","@level":"info","@msg":"exit status 1","@timestamp":"2026-01-05T12:13:15.834Z","exitCode":1,"source":1} [2026-01-05T20:13:15+08:00] dapo-from-justrl-20260105201233-58296694-81fc6-cfcd2 >> {"@caller":"gitlab.basemind.com/basemind/brainpp/projects/kubebrain/pkg/workspace/worker/init.(*Server).stopAllServices","@file":"projects/kubebrain/pkg/workspace/worker/init/server.go:194","@level":"warning","@msg":"Kill service","@timestamp":"2026-01-05T12:13:15.837Z","Pid":0,"Service":"pid","error":"os: process not initialized"} [2026-01-05T20:13:15+08:00] dapo-from-justrl-20260105201233-58296694-81fc6-cfcd2 >> {"@caller":"gitlab.basemind.com/basemind/brainpp/projects/kubebrain/cmd/worker-init/app/options.(*Options).Run","@file":"projects/kubebrain/cmd/worker-init/app/options/options.go:122","@level":"error","@msg":"Exited","@timestamp":"2026-01-05T12:13:15.837Z","error":"user command: exit status 1"} 这啥报错？

这是一个 pip 命令语法错误。从日志可以看到：

```bash
pip install -e --no-deps
```

**问题原因：**
- `pip install -e` 需要指定一个路径或 VCS URL
- 但是命令中 `-e` 后面直接跟了 `--no-deps`，没有指定要安装的包的路径

**正确的语法应该是：**

```bash
# 本地路径安装
pip install -e . --no-deps

# 或指定具体路径
pip install -e /path/to/package --no-deps

# 或从 git 安装
pip install -e git+https://github.com/user/repo.git --no-deps
```

**修复方法：**
1. 如果是在项目根目录安装当前项目：
   ```bash
   pip install -e . --no-deps
   ```

2. 如果是安装特定路径的包：
   ```bash
   pip install -e /path/to/your/package --no-deps
   ```

3. 如果不需要可编辑模式，可以直接：
   ```bash
   pip install --no-deps /path/to/package
   ```

检查你的脚本或配置文件中的 pip 命令，补充缺失的路径参数即可。
